Scenario: Verify login page loads successfully with email and password fields present
Steps:
1. Open browser
2. Navigate to https://qa.cirakas.com/login/
3. Check email field exists
4. Check password field exists
Expected Result: Page loads. Email field (#login-email) and password field (#login-password) are both present and visible

Scenario: Verify email field has HTML5 email type validation before submission
Steps:
1. Enter invalid email "abc" in email field
2. Check input type is "email"
Expected Result: Input type="email" triggers browser validation for proper email format

Scenario: Verify email field is required (empty submission shows validation)
Steps:
1. Leave email field empty
2. Click Sign In button
Expected Result: Browser shows validation message on email field (field is marked as :invalid)

Scenario: Verify password field is required (empty submission shows validation)
Steps:
1. Fill valid email
2. Leave password field empty
3. Click Sign In button
Expected Result: Browser shows validation message on password field

Scenario: Verify login with valid credentials navigates to 2FA page
Steps:
1. Enter email rajeev@yopmail.com
2. Enter password Cirakas@123456
3. Click Sign In button
Expected Result: Page transitions to 2FA verification screen showing OTP input field

Scenario: Verify 2FA page shows OTP input field
Precondition: User is on 2FA page after valid login
Steps:
1. After successful login
2. Check for OTP input field
Expected Result: OTP input field with id="otp" and placeholder "Enter 6-digit code" is visible

Scenario: Verify 2FA page shows 'Sending verification code' message
Precondition: User is on 2FA page after valid login
Steps:
1. After successful login
2. Check page text
Expected Result: Page displays 'Sending your verification code...' message

Scenario: Verify OTP field accepts 6-digit code
Steps:
1. Enter 123456 in OTP field
2. Verify input value
Expected Result: OTP field accepts exactly 6 numeric digits

Scenario: Verify empty OTP submission shows validation
Steps:
1. Leave OTP field empty
2. Click Verify button
Expected Result: Browser shows validation or error message for empty OTP

Scenario: Negative: Verify login with invalid email format fails
Steps:
1. Enter invalid email (no @)
2. Enter valid password
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Form submission is blocked by browser validation (email input is :invalid)

Scenario: Negative: Verify login with wrong password
Steps:
1. Enter valid email rajeev@yopmail.com
2. Enter wrong password WrongPass123
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Error message is displayed or user stays on login page

Scenario: Negative: Verify login with empty fields
Steps:
1. Leave both fields empty
2. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Email field is marked as invalid by HTML5 validation

Scenario: Negative: Verify login with non-existent email
Steps:
1. Enter nonexistent@example.com
2. Enter any password
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Error message is displayed and user stays on login page

Scenario: Negative: Verify OTP with non-numeric characters
Steps:
1. Enter alphabetic characters in OTP field
2. Check field behavior
Expected Result: OTP field may reject or handle non-numeric input gracefully

Scenario: Negative: Verify OTP with wrong code
Steps:
1. Enter 000000 in OTP field
2. Click Verify
Expected Result: Error message is displayed for invalid OTP

Scenario: Edge: Verify email field trims whitespace
Steps:
1. Enter ' rajeev@yopmail.com ' (with spaces)
2. Enter valid password
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Login succeeds and navigates to 2FA page (email is trimmed)

Scenario: Edge: Verify OTP field max length is 6 characters
Steps:
1. Enter 1234567 (7 digits) in OTP field
2. Check field value
Expected Result: OTP field only accepts max 6 digits

Scenario: Edge: Verify 'Back' button on 2FA page navigates back to login
Steps: 1. Click Back button on 2FA page
Expected Result: User is navigated back to the login form with email/password fields

Scenario: Accessibility: Verify labels are associated with input fields
Steps:
1. Check for label elements associated with #login-email and #login-password
2. Verify placeholder text is present
Expected Result: Input fields have proper labels or aria-labels for screen readers

Scenario: Accessibility: Verify keyboard navigation between fields
Steps:
1. Tab from email to password field
2. Tab to Sign In button
Expected Result: Tab order follows: email -> password -> Sign In button

Scenario: Boundary: Verify very long email input
Steps:
1. Enter 255-character email in email field
2. Check if field accepts it
Expected Result: Email field handles long input gracefully without breaking layout

Scenario: Regression: Run full login test suite
Steps:
1. Execute all login test cases
2. Compare results with baseline
Expected Result: All tests produce consistent results with previous run
